title: Create the ability to batch transfer automations on a per board basis

posts.author: Stacey_Telfer (Stacey Telfer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Have the ability to batch transfer automations from one user to another, on a per-board basis. Currently, an admin can only batch assign all user automations, regardless of which board they are on.

What are you trying to achieve

Time saving and improved efficiencies
